---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability (in scope = finding/characterizing bugs)
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What & why**
The capability you want and the problem it solves.

**Scope check**
NEMESIS finds and reports miscompilations/crashes; it does not weaponize them. Exploit
primitives, shellcode, and sandbox-escape generation are out of scope (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
Confirm your request is about *finding/characterizing/reporting* bugs.

- [ ] This is about finding or triaging bugs, not exploiting them.

**Proposal**
Sketch of the approach (new strategy? new target? triage/report improvement?).
